PowerShell($base = "https://api.github.com/repos/crawl/crawl/contents/crawl-ref/source/rltiles/mon"; foreach \($dir in @\("animals", "human", "undead", "unique"\)\) { $names = \(curl.exe -s "$base/$dir" | ConvertFrom-Json\) | ForEach-Object { $_.name }; Write-Output "=== $dir ==="; Write-Output \($names -join ", "\) })
